The Bardo of Ice is a poetic term used to describe the experience someone will have during [[cryonics]] from the beginning to the end of their preservation. It also refers to the historical phase between the founding of [[Lifeism]] and [[the Resurrection]]

[[Category:Cryonics]] [[Category:Immortality]]
[[sn:Bardo of Ice]][[Category:History]]
[[sn:Bardo of Ice]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
